name: bedaanwaves
description: Unified Bedaan Ecosystem - Market Analysis & AI Trading Platform

scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.build:backend: echo 'Backend uses Python - no build needed'
scripts.start: npm run start:backend & npm run start:frontend
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint:backend && npm run lint:frontend
scripts.lint:backend: cd backend && flake8 app/ && mypy app/
